returns.pnlBps: PnL in basis points (can be negative).

returns.pnls: Array of PnL values in basis points.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

routeSubscriptionFee(address,address,uin.details: Only callable by the authorized payment relay.

params.agentAddress: The agent whose creator receives the fee.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

deactivateAgent(address).notice: Deactivate an agent (remove from active roster).

getAgentPnL(address).notice: Get the PnL for an agent based on latest snapshot.

getLeaderboard().notice: Get the full leaderboard: addresses, PnLs, and names.

registerAgent(address,string,uint256).notice: Register a new AI agent on the leaderboard.

routeSubscriptionFee(address,address,uin.notice: Route a subscription fee from subscriber to agent creator + treasury.

takeSnapshot(address,uint256).notice: Take a PnL snapshot for an agent.

treasury().notice: Treasury address for platform fee collection
